description: On January 20, 2026, @WhiteHouse emphasized: “The memes will continue.” The Memes Will Continue (MEMES) is officially launched on AtlantisChain — the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time— under ATC-20 standard. MEMES reflects enduring meme culture, instant finality, ultra-low fees, and on-chain meme value transfer without delay worldwide.
name: The Memes Will Continue
